name: GPS Route Capture And Replay
summary: Add native iOS GPS run capture, backend run persistence, and basic replay surfaces.

notes: The web workspace still has pre-existing lint failures in shared UI components and StorePage lint directives.
The shipped run replay surface introduced no additional web lint failures beyond that baseline.
Target-based xcodebuild validation was used because the project does not include a checked-in shared GearSnitch scheme.

discovered_work: Repo-wide web lint still fails on pre-existing react-refresh export violations in shared UI components.
StorePage still has pre-existing unused eslint-disable directives that fail the workspace lint run.
Target-based xcodebuild is the stable iOS validation path because a checked-in shared GearSnitch scheme is absent.
